title: $BTC Trade Idea | Forex Signals

segments.text: Bitcoin on the 30 minute chart, this is broken structure, bullish, look for it to pull back
and then give you another breakout like that to get long. If you're getting hammered by the
volatility in the markets, I highly recommend you watch my video on how to beat market volatility
on my website, AnthonyFX.com. There's also links to my discord where I'm uploading daily trade
ideas. With that, have a great day and I'll see you in the next one.

full_text: Bitcoin on the 30 minute chart, this is broken structure, bullish, look for it to pull back and then give you another breakout like that to get long. If you're getting hammered by the volatility in the markets, I highly recommend you watch my video on how to beat market volatility on my website, AnthonyFX.com. There's also links to my discord where I'm uploading daily trade ideas. With that, have a great day and I'll see you in the next one.
